name: CopperGuard Fungicide
description: Copper-based protective fungicide. Controls early blight, late blight and downy mildew on tomatoes, potatoes and vegetables. Mix 3g per liter of water and spray every 7-10 days.

name: MancoShield 80 WP
description: Broad-spectrum contact fungicide (Mancozeb 80%). Protects leaves and fruit against leaf spot, rust and anthracnose. Apply as a preventive spray before disease appears.

name: SulfaCure Wettable Sulfur
description: Wettable sulfur powder for powdery mildew, rust and mite control. Safe for organic gardens. Do not apply in temperatures above 30C to avoid leaf burn.

name: NeemPro Organic Oil
description: Cold-pressed neem oil concentrate. Controls aphids, whiteflies, spider mites and thrips. Organic and bee-friendly when sprayed in the evening. Mix 5ml per liter of water.

name: ImidaShield 35 SC
description: Systemic insecticide (Imidacloprid 35%) for sucking pests such as aphids, jassids and whiteflies. Absorbed by the plant for long-lasting protection. Follow label dosage carefully.

name: BioThur BT Spray
description: Biological insecticide based on Bacillus thuringiensis. Targets caterpillars and leaf-eating larvae without harming beneficial insects. Ideal for organic crop protection.

name: CuproBac Copper Hydroxide
description: Copper hydroxide bactericide for bacterial spot, bacterial canker and blight. Forms a protective film on leaves and fruit. Apply at first sign of bacterial infection.

name: StreptoCure 50 WP
description: Agricultural bactericide for fire blight and bacterial wilt on fruit trees and vegetables. Use as a preventive spray during early flowering. Rotate to avoid resistance.

name: AgroBac Defense
description: Dual-action copper plus mancozeb formula controlling both bacterial and fungal diseases. Excellent for tomato, pepper and citrus. Provides broad protective coverage.

name: NPK Balance 20-20-20
description: Water-soluble balanced fertilizer with equal nitrogen, phosphorus and potassium plus micronutrients. Boosts overall growth and recovery after disease. Mix 2g per liter.

name: RootBoost Seaweed Extract
description: Organic seaweed biostimulant rich in natural hormones and trace elements. Strengthens roots, improves stress tolerance and increases plant immunity against disease.

name: MicroMax Micronutrient Mix
description: Chelated micronutrient blend (iron, zinc, manganese, boron) that corrects yellowing and deficiency symptoms. Foliar feed for fast uptake and greener, healthier leaves.
